title.en: Fernandez defends Argentina as Messi questions remain
title.zh-CN: 费尔南德斯为阿根廷辩护，因为梅西的问题仍然存在

summary.en: Midfielder Enzo Fernandez claims Argentina represented their nation "in the best possible way" in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 中场球员恩佐·费尔南德斯（ Enzo Fernandez ）声称，阿根廷在世界杯上“以最好的方式”代表了他们的国家。

title.en: Infantino's 'time is up' with Fifa - La Liga boss
title.zh-CN: Infantino与国际足联的“时间到了” -西甲老板

summary.en: La Liga president Javier Tebas calls for Fifa president Gianni Infantino to quit, and claims the governing body is "destroying the football industry".
summary.zh-CN: 西甲主席哈维尔·特巴斯（ Javier Tebas ）呼吁国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺（ Gianni Infantino ）辞职，并声称管理机构正在“摧毁足球产业”。

title.en: The defining moments of the 2026 World Cup

summary.en: From historic World Cup debuts and emotional first victories, to new stars and the brilliance of legends - relive the defining moments of the 2026 Fifa World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 从历史性的世界杯首次亮相和情感上的第一场胜利，到新星和传奇的辉煌-重温2026年世界杯的决定性时刻。

title.en: Keeper Martinez may 'step aside' from Argentina
title.zh-CN: 守门员马丁内斯可能会从阿根廷“退场”

summary.en: Argentina goalkeeper Emi Martinez says he is considering whether it is "time to step aside" from international football after his side's 1-0 defeat to Spain in the World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷门将埃米·马丁内斯（ Emi Martinez ）表示，在他的球队在世界杯决赛中以1比0击败西班牙后，他正在考虑是否“是时候离开”国际足球了。

title.en: Ipswich complete £20m deal for Ghana winger Fatawu
title.zh-CN: Ipswich完成与加纳边锋Fatawu的£ 2000万交易

summary.en: Ipswich Town complete the £20m signing of Abdul Fatawu, who played in all four of Ghana's games at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Ipswich Town完成了Abdul Fatawu的2000万英镑签约， Abdul Fatawu参加了加纳在世界杯上的所有四场比赛。

title.en: Bournemouth midfielder Scott rejects new contract
title.zh-CN: 伯恩茅斯中场斯科特拒绝新合同

summary.en: Bournemouth midfielder Alex Scott rejects a new contract amid growing Premier League interest in the England Under-21 international.
summary.zh-CN: 伯恩茅斯中场球员亚历克斯·斯科特拒绝了一份新合同，因为英超对英格兰21岁以下国家队的兴趣越来越大。

title.en: Why World Cup can be game-changer for ambitious MLS
title.zh-CN: 为什么世界杯可以改变雄心勃勃的MLS的游戏规则

summary.en: Can the success of the 2026 World Cup help MLS become one of the world's elite leagues?
summary.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯的成功能否帮助MLS成为世界精英联赛之一？

title.en: More than the Score

summary.en: Erling Haaland didn't lift the World Cup - but he's won millions of new fans in the US
summary.zh-CN: Erling Haaland没有举起世界杯-但他在美国赢得了数百万新球迷

title.en: Ipswich open talks for Celtic star Maeda - gossip
title.zh-CN: 凯尔特明星前田的伊普斯维奇公开谈话-八卦

summary.en: Newly-promoted Premier League side keen on Celtic forward, with Scottish champions lining up Egypt winger as a possible replacement.
summary.zh-CN: 新晋的英超球队热衷于凯尔特人前锋，苏格兰冠军排队埃及边锋作为可能的替代者。

title.en: Tottenham sign France defender Sombath from Lyon
title.zh-CN: 来自里昂的托特纳姆标志法国后卫Sombath

summary.en: Tottenham have signed France international Alice Sombath for a club record fee from Lyon.
summary.zh-CN: 托特纳姆热刺签下了法国国脚爱丽丝·索姆巴特（ Alice Sombath ） ，并从里昂获得了俱乐部

title.en: Enzo Fernandez: Argentina played with 'pride' and 'humility'
title.zh-CN: 恩佐·费尔南德斯：阿根廷以“骄傲”和“谦逊”打球

summary.en: Enzo Fernandez has praised Argentina for playing with "pride" and "humility" at the 2026 World Cup after it was confirmed FIFA will investigate the team's behaviour after the final.
summary.zh-CN: 恩佐·费尔南德斯（ Enzo Fernandez ）在确认国际足联将在决赛后调查球队的行为后，赞扬阿根廷在2026年世界杯上表现出“骄傲”和“谦逊”。

title.zh-CN: 现在观看世界杯的58次转会已经结束
